mapper.select: SELECT cu.id, cu.category_name, cu.category_icon, cu.category_type FROM category_user cu WHERE cu.user_id = #{userId} AND cu.category_type = #{categoryType} ORDER BY cu.sort ASC
SELECT cu.id, cu.category_name, cu.category_icon, cu.category_type FROM category_user cu WHERE cu.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY cu.sort ASC
